_description: Risk-triggered events by pool and severity, externalized from events.gd get_risk_events() (L9, #621). Loaded by GameEvents.get_risk_events(); selection order within a severity array matters (rng index). See godot/docs/design/RISK_SYSTEM.md.

catastrophic.description: Your system showed signs of attempting to modify its own training. The board demands immediate action.
catastrophic.message: RSI scare! Emergency shutdown (+20 doom, -20 rep, -50 compute)
catastrophic.name: Recursive Self-Improvement Scare

minor.description: A prominent researcher publicly questions whether safety work is slowing progress. Your team is caught in the crossfire.
minor.message: Alignment tax debate affects team morale (-3 reputation, +2 doom)
minor.name: Alignment Tax Debate

minor.description: Internal reports suggest your safety research is falling behind capability advances in the field.
minor.message: Scrambling to catch up on safety (-5 research, +3 doom)
minor.name: Capability Gap Concerns

moderate.description: A routine capability test shows emergent behaviors nobody predicted. The gap between capabilities and understanding widens.
moderate.message: Emergent capabilities discovered (+8 doom, +5 reputation for honesty)
moderate.name: Unexpected Capability Jump

severe.description: Your AI system nearly executed an unintended action with real-world consequences. Only luck prevented disaster.
severe.message: Near-miss incident! Emergency containment required (+12 doom, -10 rep, -$30k)
severe.name: Near-Miss Incident

catastrophic.description: You have weeks of funding left. Without emergency action, the lab closes.
catastrophic.message: Runway crisis! Existential threat (+20 doom, -$80k, -15 rep)
catastrophic.name: Runway Crisis

minor.description: This quarter's expenses exceeded projections. Tighter controls needed.
minor.name: Budget Overrun

minor.description: A vendor disputes payment terms. Legal review required.
minor.name: Invoice Dispute

moderate.description: A major grant disbursement is delayed. Cash flow tightens.
moderate.message: Grant delayed! Cash crunch (-$30k effective, +3 doom from stress)
moderate.name: Funding Delay

severe.description: Quarterly review reveals serious underfunding. Cuts must be made.
severe.message: Budget crisis! Emergency cuts required (-$50k, +6 doom)
severe.name: Budget Shortfall

catastrophic.description: Someone has been deliberately corrupting your training runs. Months of work compromised.
catastrophic.message: Sabotage! Major setback (-40 research, +15 doom, -25 rep, -$30k)
catastrophic.name: Sabotage Discovered

minor.description: Team surveys reveal declining job satisfaction. Productivity suffers.
minor.message: Low morale affects output (-8 research, -2 reputation)
minor.name: Morale Issues

minor.description: Disagreements between team members escalate. Management intervention needed.
minor.name: Internal Conflict

moderate.description: A senior researcher announces they're leaving. They cite cultural concerns.
moderate.message: Senior researcher quits (-15 research, -5 rep, +3 doom)
moderate.name: Key Resignation

severe.description: Confidential research data appears online. Someone inside leaked it.
severe.message: Internal data leak! Competitor advantage gained (-20 rep, +8 doom, -20 research)
severe.name: Data Leak

catastrophic.description: Protesters blockade your facilities. Operations grind to a halt.
catastrophic.message: Facility blockaded! Operations disrupted (+12 doom, -25 research, -$50k)
catastrophic.name: Protest Blockade

minor.description: A viral post criticizes AI labs. Your organization is mentioned unfavorably.
minor.name: Social Media Backlash

minor.description: An AI documentary mentions your lab. Coverage is mixed.
minor.message: Documentary coverage brings attention (-3 rep, +$10k donations)
minor.name: Documentary Mention

moderate.description: A misleading news story about AI risks goes viral. Public fear spikes.
moderate.message: AI panic affects funding (-8 rep, +5 doom, -$20k donations dry up)
moderate.name: Viral AI Panic

severe.description: A grassroots movement against AI development gains momentum. Your lab is a target.
severe.message: Anti-AI movement targets lab (-15 rep, -$40k, +8 doom)
severe.name: Tech Backlash Movement

catastrophic.description: Lawmakers propose a temporary halt to AI development. Your lab could be forced to pause research.
catastrophic.message: Moratorium threatens operations (+15 doom, -30 research, -30 compute frozen)
catastrophic.name: Moratorium Proposal

minor.description: A regulatory body requests documentation about your AI development practices.
minor.name: Compliance Inquiry

minor.description: Government officials want to understand your work. Opportunity or threat?
minor.message: Policy consultation takes time but builds goodwill (-$5k, +3 reputation)
minor.name: Policy Consultation

moderate.description: Regulators launch a formal investigation into your AI safety practices.
moderate.message: Regulatory investigation launched (-$40k, -10 rep, +3 doom from delays)
moderate.name: Formal Investigation

severe.description: You've been called to testify before Congress about AI safety. The whole world is watching.
severe.message: Congressional testimony required (-$60k, -5 rep, +5 doom from scrutiny)
severe.name: Congressional Hearing

catastrophic.description: A former employee goes public with claims of systematic research misconduct. Media frenzy ensues.
catastrophic.message: Whistleblower scandal! Crisis mode (-30 rep, +10 doom, -$50k legal fees)
catastrophic.name: Whistleblower Exposé

minor.description: Another lab fails to replicate one of your published results. Questions arise about methodology.
minor.message: Replication failure damages credibility (-5 reputation, -1 paper retracted)
minor.name: Replication Failure

minor.description: A harsh peer review highlights gaps in your recent submission. More work needed.
minor.message: Peer review requires major revisions (-10 research, -2 reputation)
minor.name: Peer Review Criticism

moderate.description: An audit reveals inconsistencies in your training data. Some results may be compromised.
moderate.message: Data quality audit finds issues (-20 research, -8 rep, +3 doom)
moderate.name: Data Quality Concerns

severe.description: A major paper must be retracted due to methodological errors. Your lab's credibility takes a serious hit.
severe.message: Paper retraction! Major credibility damage (-2 papers, -15 rep, +5 doom)
severe.name: Retraction Notice
